lcp_element_before: Hero Dracula hardcopy img, then first-visit tour body after image optimization
lcp_element_after: Hero paragraph / stable first-screen content; tour delayed beyond LCP window

top_causes.cause: LCP hero image was a 67KB eager image and selected as the mobile LCP candidate
First-visit site tour auto-opened at 850ms and became a late LCP text candidate
requestIdleCallback route prefetch/settings fetch ran too early under Lighthouse and loaded noncritical chunks/API calls in the metric window
Header used a 72KB PNG brand mark at 36-44px display size

fixes_applied: Added responsive compressed Dracula hero WebP variants and a single high-priority preload for the true LCP asset.
Reduced only the mobile hero book image candidate and used a procedural graphical mobile face to keep cover aesthetics without a large LCP img candidate.
Delayed the first-visit tour automatic display and lazy-loaded the tour module after the LCP window while preserving ?tour=1 forced behavior.
Delayed route prefetch and public settings fetch until after the critical metric window.
Replaced the default bundled 72KB PNG brand mark with responsive 6KB/9KB WebP variants.
rejected_fixes: Eager-loading Home into the main bundle worsened Lighthouse from 93 to 91 and was reverted.
Hydrating the static shell was rejected because the shell is not a React tree match and would risk hydration errors.
Full hero redesign and paid/generated cover changes were rejected by the cost governor.
expected_impact: Restore Lighthouse >=94 without changing the validated hero strategy or cover policy.
rollback_plan: Revert the performance-rescue source files and remove the optimized WebP variants if any mobile visual regression appears; preserve cover resolver and Bengali reader-only evidence.
